data.name: Minimal Pairs Contrast
data.description: Produce contrasting word pairs differing by a single phoneme to sharpen articulation precision in real spoken contexts.

data.name: Phoneme Drills in Words
data.description: Produce target phonemes accurately across words of increasing length and complexity, from CVC to long professional vocabulary.

data.name: Sentence Reading for Clarity
data.description: Read sentences at increasing speeds and complexity levels, assessing whether articulatory precision is maintained across different speaking rates.

data.name: Sustained Voice in Real Speech
data.description: Maintain consistent voice quality across increasingly long and complex spoken sentences in functional professional contexts.

data.name: Weak Syllable Stress Correction
data.description: Identify and correct stress placement on multi-syllabic words and phrases, from isolated words to full professional sentences.

data.name: Word List Reading
data.description: Read target phoneme word lists aloud, from simple initial consonants to complex final clusters in professional vocabulary.

data.name: Sentence Articulation Drill
data.description: Read sentences containing high densities of target phonemes at natural rate, from everyday content to complex connected speech.

data.name: Contrast Sentence Reading
data.description: Read the same sentence at different speeds to assess whether articulatory clarity is maintained as speaking rate increases.

data.name: Stress Pattern Correction
data.description: Identify and correct stress errors on words and sentences, progressing from single words to multi-word professional sentences.

data.name: Paragraph Reading Aloud
data.description: Read paragraphs of increasing complexity at natural pace, assessing prosody, stress, and articulatory precision in connected professional speech.

data.name: Pacing Control
data.description: Regulate speaking rate across real-world professional tasks — from relaxed conversation to structured timed presentations.

data.name: Breath Management
data.description: Manage breath support across real spoken sentences and professional monologues — from single sentences on one breath to extended speech with phrase-boundary breathing.

data.name: Pausing Control
data.description: Control pause placement — from punctuation-guided pauses to eliminating filler words and using strategic pausing for emphasis.

data.name: Intonation Training
data.description: Produce accurate intonation patterns for questions, statements, lists, and contrastive stress in professional and social speech contexts.

data.name: Reading with Emotion
data.description: Deliver spoken content with appropriate emotional tone — from professional warmth to urgency and sarcasm — in realistic contexts.

data.name: Speech Rate Training
data.description: Read sentences at progressively faster target rates, assessing whether articulatory clarity is maintained as pace increases toward natural conversational speed.

data.name: Rhythmic Phrase Practice
data.description: Produce natural connected speech features including linking, contractions, and reductions in real conversational and professional contexts.

data.name: Stuttering Management Technique
data.description: Apply stuttering management techniques — gentle onset, voluntary stuttering, pull-out, and preparatory sets — in realistic speaking situations.

data.name: Breath-Group Phrasing
data.description: Organise speech into natural breath groups — from marked pause positions to self-selected phrasing in extended professional monologues.

data.name: Prosody and Naturalness Scoring
data.description: Produce natural, varied prosody across professional and presentational contexts — from warm greetings to persuasive speeches and broadcast-quality delivery.

data.name: Self-Introduction Practice
data.description: Deliver self-introductions in progressively more challenging professional contexts, from casual 3-sentence introductions to formal panel presentations.

data.name: Roleplay: Ordering Food and Drink
data.description: Roleplay ordering food and drink in progressively challenging scenarios — from a simple café order to complex dietary restriction conversations.

data.name: Emergency Phrase Practice
data.description: Produce clear emergency communication — from urgent phrases to structured 999 calls and group briefings — with appropriate urgency and calm.

data.name: Telephone Task
data.description: Complete telephone communication tasks of increasing complexity — from leaving a voicemail to handling a formal complaint call.

data.name: Asking for Help
data.description: Request assistance in progressively more complex real-world situations — from asking for directions to advocating for yourself in a professional meeting.

data.name: Rephrasing Task
data.description: Rephrase statements with the same meaning for different audiences, registers, and communication purposes — from simple vocabulary swaps to multi-audience explanations.

data.name: Short Presentation
data.description: Deliver structured presentations of increasing length and complexity — from a 20-second description to a 2-minute structured argument with Q&A.

data.name: Problem-Solving Speech
data.description: Think and speak through solutions to real-world problems — from simple everyday scenarios to complex high-pressure professional challenges.

data.name: Debate Task
data.description: Argue positions in structured debates of increasing complexity — from a single-sentence opinion to a 2-minute evidence-based argument with rebuttal.

data.name: Daily Talking Diary
data.description: Record spoken diary entries of increasing length and complexity — from 2–3 sentences to reflective 2-minute entries with self-evaluation.
